elements.heroSubtitle: Reception, social support and defence of the rights of refugees, people seeking international protection and exiled people in Brussels.

maintext.p1: Founded in 1937 to support refugees from the Spanish Civil War, SESO is active in the fields of social work and migration. We provide individual and personalised support to the people who use our services, especially migrants and refugees, while respecting their autonomy, fundamental rights, right to family life and privacy. We promote tolerance, respect for rights, the fight against all forms of discrimination, free inquiry, social justice and emancipation.

Contact.title: A question, a request or a first appointment?
Contact.intro: Our team welcomes you in Saint-Gilles and guides you towards the service best suited to your situation.

Services.DPI: Reception structure for applicants for international protection

descriptions.SSG: First-line general social assistance for people and families facing difficulties.
descriptions.DPI: Nearly 100 reception places in individual housing, in partnership with CIRÉ and Fedasil.
descriptions.MENA: Support and guardianships for unaccompanied foreign minors, mandated by the FPS Justice.
descriptions.REAB: Information and support for opening voluntary return files with the IOM.
